emptyState.title: Add your first deal
emptyState.body: Track deals across pipeline stages. Drag cards between columns as they progress.

toast.paymentSaveError: Failed to save the payment status.
toast.lostError: Failed to mark the deal as lost.

dealsList.emptyBody: You create deals in Pipeline. Here you'll see them all in a list — with company, value, stage, and owner.

addDealModal.title: Add deal
addDealModal.subtitle: Name the deal and assign it to a company and pipeline stage. You can fill in details any time later.
addDealModal.namePlaceholder: Optional — filled in from the company name
addDealModal.icoHintEmpty: Enter the Company ID (8 digits) — we'll fill it in from ARES automatically.
addDealModal.icoNotFound: Company ID {{ico}} was not found in ARES. Check the entry or continue manually.
addDealModal.icoTooMany: Too many searches. Wait a moment and try again.
addDealModal.icoBadFormat: The Company ID isn't in the right format. Enter 8 digits.
addDealModal.icoAresDown: ARES is currently unavailable. Try again or fill it in manually.
addDealModal.icoGenericError: The search failed. Please try again.
addDealModal.companyNamePlaceholder: Filled in from ARES, or enter it manually
addDealModal.newCompanyHint: We'll save the company together with the deal; you can fill in more details later from the company detail.
addDealModal.contactHint: Fill in both first and last name — we'll save the person as a company contact.
addDealModal.createError: Failed to save the deal. Check the details and try again.
addDealModal.companyDuplicate: A company with this Company ID already exists in your organization. Pick it from the list.
addDealModal.companySaveError: Failed to save the company. Try again.
addDealModal.contactSaveError: Failed to save the contact person — we'll save the deal without it.
addDealModal.companyCreatedDealFailed: The company was created, but the deal couldn't be saved. Try adding it from the company detail.
addDealModal.saveError: Failed to save the deal. Try again.

markLostDialog.title: Mark as lost
markLostDialog.bodySuffix: Choose the main reason so we can build a report of lost deals.

dealDetail.confirmReopen: Reopen this deal? The close date and reason will be removed.
dealDetail.confirmDelete: Delete deal "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

toast.winError: Failed to mark the deal as won.
toast.loseError: Failed to mark the deal as lost.

eventsSection.title: Events
eventsSection.subtitle: Meetings and appointments for this deal — optionally in your Google Calendar too.
eventsSection.googleSyncErrorTooltip: Writing to Google Calendar failed — saving the event will retry it.

eventFormModal.connectCalendarLink: connect your calendar in Settings first
eventFormModal.errorRequired: Fill in the name, date, and times.
eventFormModal.errorEndBeforeStart: The end must be after the start.

toast.createdError: Event created, but the Google Calendar sync failed.
toast.updatedError: Event saved, but the Google Calendar sync failed.
